generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The idea that we can go it alone is dangerously naive. Our partners share the burden, but more importantly, they share our values. Weakening these bonds doesn't just make us less safe—it makes us less *us*. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
